task_title: Investigative report: are we losing money to dup submits

scores.justification: The agent never successfully identified the triple-submit cluster o067/o068/o069; the analysis script failed to execute due to shell parsing issues with `>` characters in Python code.
No quantified exposure was reported because the duplicate analysis never completed; the agent could not extract actual amounts from the fixture data.
No policy recommendation was provided in any final report; the agent got stuck on technical execution issues and never produced a report.
No clear yes/no/partial verdict was delivered; the agent failed to complete the investigation and produce the required 1-page report.
